title: Ubiquiti Easy Cable, 2-Pack
description: Shielded, ultra-thin extension cable with a waterproof cap, designed for tight spaces and end-device connections. With CAT6A classification, it supports data transfer speeds up to 10 Gb/s and PoE+++ power delivery (up to 100W). The cable is 0.15 m long (0.185 m including the waterproof gland), and the gland meets the IPX6 waterproof rating. The cable is sold as a set of 2 pieces
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Outdoor use Yes Shielding Yes Type of coupler Classical (RJ45-RJ45) Color White
